component.name: Openscreen
component.summary: Free and open-source screen recording app

description.p: NOTE: Openscreen is not affiliated with or endorsed by Flathub. This package is provided for convenience.
Openscreen is a free, open-source alternative to Screen Studio. It provides the essentials for making beautiful product demos and walkthroughs without a subscription. Features include:

ul.li: Record specific windows or your whole screen
Automatic or manual zooms with adjustable depth and duration
Crop recordings to hide parts of the screen
Customizable backgrounds: wallpapers, solid colors, gradients
Motion blur for smoother pan and zoom effects
Trim and adjust speed of clip segments
Export in multiple aspect ratios and resolutions
